task:
Build this app in Clear:

**Support Triage (AI-assisted)** (Level 9)

Build a support ticket triage system. Tickets have subject, body, from_email, category, priority, status. Use a Claude agent named 'Triage' that receives a ticket and returns a JSON object with {category, priority}. When a new ticket is POSTed, call the Triage agent to classify it before saving. Need: POST /api/tickets (auto-classifies), GET /api/tickets (list), GET /api/tickets/open.

Starting skeleton:
```clear
build for web
final_source:
build for web and javascript backend
database is local memory

owner is 'admin@example.com'
allow signup and login

create a Tickets table:
  subject, required
  body
  from_email
  category, default 'General'
  priority, default 'Normal'
  status, default 'open'

agent 'Triage' receives ticket:
  response = ask claude 'Classify this support ticket into a category and priority level. Be concise.' with ticket returning JSON text:
    category
    priority
  send back response

when user sends ticket to /api/tickets:
  validate ticket:
    subject is text, required
  categorized = call 'Triage' with request
  request's category is categorized's category
  request's priority is categorized's priority
  saved = save request to Tickets
  send back saved with status 201

when user calls GET /api/tickets:
  tickets = get all Tickets
  send back tickets

when user calls GET /api/tickets/open:
  open_tickets = get all Tickets where status is 'open'
  send back open_tickets

page 'App' at '/':
  requires login
  on page load get open_tickets from '/api/tickets/open'
  section 'Open Tickets':
    display open_tickets as table
